sprite_sheet.prompt: Create a pixel art RPG character sprite sheet for Mnemonist (기본직). memory mage with floating tomes, blue and white, basic equipment, simple design. Sheet layout: 5 rows (one per direction: front, front-left, left, back-left, back), each row contains 35 frames of animation (idle 4, walk 6, attacks 12, cast 5, hit 3, death 5). 64x64 pixels per frame. Dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style, 2.5 head chibi proportions. Art style: pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.

2D pixel art RPG character sprite sheet::2, Mnemonist 기본직::1.5, memory mage with floating tomes, blue and white, basic equipment, simple design, 5 directional rows, 7 animation sequences per row, 64x64 frames, dark fantasy MMORPG::2, dark fantasy Korean MMORPG::1.5, 2px black outline clean pixel edges::2, transparent background, masterpiece quality --v 6.1 --s 200 --no 3d render photo realistic blurry watermark text modern sci-fi --ar 11:5
